entries.title: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering: Saturn Would Float
entries.hook: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering:
space_facts: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
stories: Saturn's density is 0.687 g/cm³ while water is 1 g/cm³. If you found a bathtub big enough Saturn would float. Jupiter is 5 times denser and would sink.
The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.
The Sun contains 99.86% of all mass in our solar system. All planets moons asteroids and comets combined make up only 0.14%. 1.3 million Earths could fit inside the Sun.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: Venus Day Longer Than Year
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
There are about 100 billion galaxies each with 100 billion stars. That is 10 sextillion stars more than all grains of sand on every beach on Earth.
The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.

space_facts: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
stories: The Sun contains 99.86% of all mass in our solar system. All planets moons asteroids and comets combined make up only 0.14%. 1.3 million Earths could fit inside the Sun.

entries.title: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering: Uranus Rolls Sideways
entries.hook: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering:
stories: Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.
The Andromeda Galaxy approaches the Milky Way at 400000 km/h. In 4.5 billion years the two galaxies will collide but no star collisions are expected due to vast distances.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.

entries.title: The universe is bigger than you can imagine: Jupiter's Great Red Spot
entries.hook: The universe is bigger than you can imagine:
stories: A storm larger than Earth has raged on Jupiter for at least 400 years. It is 16000 km wide with winds reaching 640 km/h. Scientists don't know why it hasn't dissipated.
When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.
The Andromeda Galaxy approaches the Milky Way at 400000 km/h. In 4.5 billion years the two galaxies will collide but no star collisions are expected due to vast distances.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: Earth Day Was Once 6 Hours
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
stories: When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.
In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.
Without the Moon days would become 12 hours long. Earth's tilt could shift to 45° causing extreme seasons and mass extinction. Tides would shrink by 75%.

entries.title: The universe is bigger than you can imagine: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
entries.hook: The universe is bigger than you can imagine:
space_facts: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
The Solar System Has a Tail
stories: The Sun contains 99.86% of all mass in our solar system. All planets moons asteroids and comets combined make up only 0.14%. 1.3 million Earths could fit inside the Sun.
Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
The solar system moves through space at 828000 km/h with a comet-like tail called the heliotail made of charged particles. It extends trillions of kilometers.

entries.title: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering: Neutron Stars Are Insanely Dense
entries.hook: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering:
space_facts: The Sun Is a Million Earths
stories: A neutron star is 20 km across but contains more mass than the Sun. One teaspoon weighs 10 million tons the same as every human on Earth combined.
When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.
The Sun is so massive that 1.3 million Earths could fit inside it. It converts 600 million tons of hydrogen into helium every second.

stories: The Sun contains 99.86% of all mass in our solar system. All planets moons asteroids and comets combined make up only 0.14%. 1.3 million Earths could fit inside the Sun.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.
Without the Moon days would become 12 hours long. Earth's tilt could shift to 45° causing extreme seasons and mass extinction. Tides would shrink by 75%.

entries.title: NASA confirms this incredible fact: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
entries.hook: NASA confirms this incredible fact:
space_facts: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
stories: The Sun contains 99.86% of all mass in our solar system. All planets moons asteroids and comets combined make up only 0.14%. 1.3 million Earths could fit inside the Sun.
Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
A black hole the size of a golf ball would contain the mass of Mount Everest. A tennis ball-sized one would have the mass of Earth.

entries.title: NASA confirms this incredible fact: Neutron Stars Are Insanely Dense
entries.hook: NASA confirms this incredible fact:
stories: A neutron star is 20 km across but contains more mass than the Sun. One teaspoon weighs 10 million tons the same as every human on Earth combined.
Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: Pluto's Ice Mountains
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
stories: Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.
In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.

entries.title: NASA confirms this incredible fact: Mercury Day Is 59 Earth Days
entries.hook: NASA confirms this incredible fact:
space_facts: The Solar System Has a Tail
stories: Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
A storm larger than Earth has raged on Jupiter for at least 400 years. It is 16000 km wide with winds reaching 640 km/h. Scientists don't know why it hasn't dissipated.
The solar system moves through space at 828000 km/h with a comet-like tail called the heliotail made of charged particles. It extends trillions of kilometers.

stories: Saturn's density is 0.687 g/cm³ while water is 1 g/cm³. If you found a bathtub big enough Saturn would float. Jupiter is 5 times denser and would sink.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: Venus Day Longer Than Year
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
There are about 100 billion galaxies each with 100 billion stars. That is 10 sextillion stars more than all grains of sand on every beach on Earth.
A neutron star is 20 km across but contains more mass than the Sun. One teaspoon weighs 10 million tons the same as every human on Earth combined.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: Giant Diamond in Space
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
stories: The white dwarf star BPM 37093 nicknamed Lucy is a giant crystallized carbon sphere 4000 km across. It weighs 10 billion trillion trillion carats the largest diamond ever found.
In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.

entries.title: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering: The Moon Is Drifting Away
entries.hook: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering:
stories: The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.
The white dwarf star BPM 37093 nicknamed Lucy is a giant crystallized carbon sphere 4000 km across. It weighs 10 billion trillion trillion carats the largest diamond ever found.
Saturn's north pole has a hexagonal cloud pattern 32000 km across each side longer than Earth's diameter. First seen by Voyager in 1981 no other planet has anything like it.

stories: A neutron star is 20 km across but contains more mass than the Sun. One teaspoon weighs 10 million tons the same as every human on Earth combined.

space_facts: The Solar System Has a Tail
stories: The solar system moves through space at 828000 km/h with a comet-like tail called the heliotail made of charged particles. It extends trillions of kilometers.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: Mercury Day Is 59 Earth Days

space_facts: The Solar System Has a Tail
stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.
The solar system moves through space at 828000 km/h with a comet-like tail called the heliotail made of charged particles. It extends trillions of kilometers.

entries.title: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering: More Stars Than Sand
entries.hook: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering:
space_facts: The Sun Is a Million Earths
stories: There are about 100 billion galaxies each with 100 billion stars. That is 10 sextillion stars more than all grains of sand on every beach on Earth.
The Andromeda Galaxy approaches the Milky Way at 400000 km/h. In 4.5 billion years the two galaxies will collide but no star collisions are expected due to vast distances.
The Sun is so massive that 1.3 million Earths could fit inside it. It converts 600 million tons of hydrogen into helium every second.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: Mercury Day Is 59 Earth Days
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
space_facts: The Solar System Has a Tail
stories: Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
The solar system moves through space at 828000 km/h with a comet-like tail called the heliotail made of charged particles. It extends trillions of kilometers.
A black hole the size of a golf ball would contain the mass of Mount Everest. A tennis ball-sized one would have the mass of Earth.

stories: A neutron star is 20 km across but contains more mass than the Sun. One teaspoon weighs 10 million tons the same as every human on Earth combined.

entries.title: The universe is bigger than you can imagine: Venus Day Longer Than Year
entries.hook: The universe is bigger than you can imagine:
stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.
Without the Moon days would become 12 hours long. Earth's tilt could shift to 45° causing extreme seasons and mass extinction. Tides would shrink by 75%.

space_facts: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
The Sun contains 99.86% of all mass in our solar system. All planets moons asteroids and comets combined make up only 0.14%. 1.3 million Earths could fit inside the Sun.
In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: The Moon Is Drifting Away
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
stories: The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.
Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.
Without the Moon days would become 12 hours long. Earth's tilt could shift to 45° causing extreme seasons and mass extinction. Tides would shrink by 75%.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: Coldest Place Is on Earth
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
stories: In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: Venus Day Longer Than Year
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: Jupiter's Great Red Spot
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
space_facts: The Sun Is a Million Earths
stories: A storm larger than Earth has raged on Jupiter for at least 400 years. It is 16000 km wide with winds reaching 640 km/h. Scientists don't know why it hasn't dissipated.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.
The Sun is so massive that 1.3 million Earths could fit inside it. It converts 600 million tons of hydrogen into helium every second.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
space_facts: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
stories: The Sun contains 99.86% of all mass in our solar system. All planets moons asteroids and comets combined make up only 0.14%. 1.3 million Earths could fit inside the Sun.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.
Saturn's north pole has a hexagonal cloud pattern 32000 km across each side longer than Earth's diameter. First seen by Voyager in 1981 no other planet has anything like it.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: The Moon Is Drifting Away
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
stories: The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.
Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.

space_facts: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.
The Sun contains 99.86% of all mass in our solar system. All planets moons asteroids and comets combined make up only 0.14%. 1.3 million Earths could fit inside the Sun.

stories: Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.

entries.title: The universe is bigger than you can imagine: Jupiter's Great Red Spot
entries.hook: The universe is bigger than you can imagine:
space_facts: The Sun Is a Million Earths
stories: A storm larger than Earth has raged on Jupiter for at least 400 years. It is 16000 km wide with winds reaching 640 km/h. Scientists don't know why it hasn't dissipated.
Saturn's north pole has a hexagonal cloud pattern 32000 km across each side longer than Earth's diameter. First seen by Voyager in 1981 no other planet has anything like it.
The Sun is so massive that 1.3 million Earths could fit inside it. It converts 600 million tons of hydrogen into helium every second.

entries.title: The universe is bigger than you can imagine: Olympus Mons Is Massive
entries.hook: The universe is bigger than you can imagine:
stories: Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.
A black hole the size of a golf ball would contain the mass of Mount Everest. A tennis ball-sized one would have the mass of Earth.
Without the Moon days would become 12 hours long. Earth's tilt could shift to 45° causing extreme seasons and mass extinction. Tides would shrink by 75%.

entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
space_facts: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
The Sun Is a Million Earths
stories: The Sun contains 99.86% of all mass in our solar system. All planets moons asteroids and comets combined make up only 0.14%. 1.3 million Earths could fit inside the Sun.
Without the Moon days would become 12 hours long. Earth's tilt could shift to 45° causing extreme seasons and mass extinction. Tides would shrink by 75%.
The Sun is so massive that 1.3 million Earths could fit inside it. It converts 600 million tons of hydrogen into helium every second.

entries.title: NASA confirms this incredible fact: More Stars Than Sand
entries.hook: NASA confirms this incredible fact:
space_facts: The Solar System Has a Tail
stories: There are about 100 billion galaxies each with 100 billion stars. That is 10 sextillion stars more than all grains of sand on every beach on Earth.
A neutron star is 20 km across but contains more mass than the Sun. One teaspoon weighs 10 million tons the same as every human on Earth combined.
The solar system moves through space at 828000 km/h with a comet-like tail called the heliotail made of charged particles. It extends trillions of kilometers.

entries.title: NASA confirms this incredible fact: Venus Day Longer Than Year
entries.hook: NASA confirms this incredible fact:
stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.
Saturn's north pole has a hexagonal cloud pattern 32000 km across each side longer than Earth's diameter. First seen by Voyager in 1981 no other planet has anything like it.

entries.title: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering: The Moon Is Drifting Away
entries.hook: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering:
stories: The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.
Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
Without the Moon days would become 12 hours long. Earth's tilt could shift to 45° causing extreme seasons and mass extinction. Tides would shrink by 75%.

entries.title: The universe is bigger than you can imagine: Mercury Day Is 59 Earth Days
entries.hook: The universe is bigger than you can imagine:
stories: Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.
Without the Moon days would become 12 hours long. Earth's tilt could shift to 45° causing extreme seasons and mass extinction. Tides would shrink by 75%.

stories: There are about 100 billion galaxies each with 100 billion stars. That is 10 sextillion stars more than all grains of sand on every beach on Earth.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: Neutron Stars Are Insanely Dense
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
stories: A neutron star is 20 km across but contains more mass than the Sun. One teaspoon weighs 10 million tons the same as every human on Earth combined.
When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.

stories: Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
A storm larger than Earth has raged on Jupiter for at least 400 years. It is 16000 km wide with winds reaching 640 km/h. Scientists don't know why it hasn't dissipated.
In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: Saturn Would Float
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
stories: Saturn's density is 0.687 g/cm³ while water is 1 g/cm³. If you found a bathtub big enough Saturn would float. Jupiter is 5 times denser and would sink.
When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.
A black hole the size of a golf ball would contain the mass of Mount Everest. A tennis ball-sized one would have the mass of Earth.

entries.title: The universe is bigger than you can imagine: Uranus Rolls Sideways
entries.hook: The universe is bigger than you can imagine:
space_facts: The Sun Is a Million Earths
stories: Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.
Saturn's north pole has a hexagonal cloud pattern 32000 km across each side longer than Earth's diameter. First seen by Voyager in 1981 no other planet has anything like it.
The Sun is so massive that 1.3 million Earths could fit inside it. It converts 600 million tons of hydrogen into helium every second.

stories: In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.
The Andromeda Galaxy approaches the Milky Way at 400000 km/h. In 4.5 billion years the two galaxies will collide but no star collisions are expected due to vast distances.

entries.title: NASA confirms this incredible fact: Venus Day Longer Than Year
entries.hook: NASA confirms this incredible fact:
stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.
Without the Moon days would become 12 hours long. Earth's tilt could shift to 45° causing extreme seasons and mass extinction. Tides would shrink by 75%.

entries.hook: The universe is bigger than you can imagine:
space_facts: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
The Sun Is a Million Earths
stories: The Sun contains 99.86% of all mass in our solar system. All planets moons asteroids and comets combined make up only 0.14%. 1.3 million Earths could fit inside the Sun.
A black hole the size of a golf ball would contain the mass of Mount Everest. A tennis ball-sized one would have the mass of Earth.
The Sun is so massive that 1.3 million Earths could fit inside it. It converts 600 million tons of hydrogen into helium every second.

entries.title: NASA confirms this incredible fact: More Stars Than Sand
entries.hook: NASA confirms this incredible fact:
stories: There are about 100 billion galaxies each with 100 billion stars. That is 10 sextillion stars more than all grains of sand on every beach on Earth.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.
The Andromeda Galaxy approaches the Milky Way at 400000 km/h. In 4.5 billion years the two galaxies will collide but no star collisions are expected due to vast distances.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: Mercury Day Is 59 Earth Days
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
stories: Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.
In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.

entries.title: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering: Earth Day Was Once 6 Hours
entries.hook: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering:
space_facts: The Solar System Has a Tail
stories: When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.
The Andromeda Galaxy approaches the Milky Way at 400000 km/h. In 4.5 billion years the two galaxies will collide but no star collisions are expected due to vast distances.
The solar system moves through space at 828000 km/h with a comet-like tail called the heliotail made of charged particles. It extends trillions of kilometers.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: Venus Day Longer Than Year
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
A storm larger than Earth has raged on Jupiter for at least 400 years. It is 16000 km wide with winds reaching 640 km/h. Scientists don't know why it hasn't dissipated.
Without the Moon days would become 12 hours long. Earth's tilt could shift to 45° causing extreme seasons and mass extinction. Tides would shrink by 75%.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: Giant Diamond in Space
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
stories: The white dwarf star BPM 37093 nicknamed Lucy is a giant crystallized carbon sphere 4000 km across. It weighs 10 billion trillion trillion carats the largest diamond ever found.
Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: Venus Day Longer Than Year
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
space_facts: The Sun Is a Million Earths
stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.
The Sun is so massive that 1.3 million Earths could fit inside it. It converts 600 million tons of hydrogen into helium every second.

entries.title: The universe is bigger than you can imagine: More Stars Than Sand
entries.hook: The universe is bigger than you can imagine:
stories: There are about 100 billion galaxies each with 100 billion stars. That is 10 sextillion stars more than all grains of sand on every beach on Earth.
The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.
A storm larger than Earth has raged on Jupiter for at least 400 years. It is 16000 km wide with winds reaching 640 km/h. Scientists don't know why it hasn't dissipated.

entries.title: The universe is bigger than you can imagine: Saturn Would Float

In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.
The Andromeda Galaxy approaches the Milky Way at 400000 km/h. In 4.5 billion years the two galaxies will collide but no star collisions are expected due to vast distances.

stories: There are about 100 billion galaxies each with 100 billion stars. That is 10 sextillion stars more than all grains of sand on every beach on Earth.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.
A black hole the size of a golf ball would contain the mass of Mount Everest. A tennis ball-sized one would have the mass of Earth.

entries.title: NASA confirms this incredible fact: Saturn Would Float
entries.hook: NASA confirms this incredible fact:
stories: Saturn's density is 0.687 g/cm³ while water is 1 g/cm³. If you found a bathtub big enough Saturn would float. Jupiter is 5 times denser and would sink.
A storm larger than Earth has raged on Jupiter for at least 400 years. It is 16000 km wide with winds reaching 640 km/h. Scientists don't know why it hasn't dissipated.
In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.

entries.title: The universe is bigger than you can imagine: More Stars Than Sand
entries.hook: The universe is bigger than you can imagine:
stories: There are about 100 billion galaxies each with 100 billion stars. That is 10 sextillion stars more than all grains of sand on every beach on Earth.
The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.
When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.

entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
stories: Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.
In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.
Without the Moon days would become 12 hours long. Earth's tilt could shift to 45° causing extreme seasons and mass extinction. Tides would shrink by 75%.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: Mercury Day Is 59 Earth Days
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
stories: Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
A storm larger than Earth has raged on Jupiter for at least 400 years. It is 16000 km wide with winds reaching 640 km/h. Scientists don't know why it hasn't dissipated.
When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: The Moon Is Drifting Away
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
stories: The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.
Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.

entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
stories: There are about 100 billion galaxies each with 100 billion stars. That is 10 sextillion stars more than all grains of sand on every beach on Earth.
Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.
A black hole the size of a golf ball would contain the mass of Mount Everest. A tennis ball-sized one would have the mass of Earth.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: The Moon Is Drifting Away
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
stories: The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.

entries.title: NASA confirms this incredible fact: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
entries.hook: NASA confirms this incredible fact:
space_facts: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
The Solar System Has a Tail
stories: The Sun contains 99.86% of all mass in our solar system. All planets moons asteroids and comets combined make up only 0.14%. 1.3 million Earths could fit inside the Sun.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.
The solar system moves through space at 828000 km/h with a comet-like tail called the heliotail made of charged particles. It extends trillions of kilometers.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: Jupiter's Great Red Spot
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
stories: A storm larger than Earth has raged on Jupiter for at least 400 years. It is 16000 km wide with winds reaching 640 km/h. Scientists don't know why it hasn't dissipated.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.
Saturn's north pole has a hexagonal cloud pattern 32000 km across each side longer than Earth's diameter. First seen by Voyager in 1981 no other planet has anything like it.

entries.title: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering: Neutron Stars Are Insanely Dense
entries.hook: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering:
stories: A neutron star is 20 km across but contains more mass than the Sun. One teaspoon weighs 10 million tons the same as every human on Earth combined.
Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.

The Sun is so massive that 1.3 million Earths could fit inside it. It converts 600 million tons of hydrogen into helium every second.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: More Stars Than Sand
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
space_facts: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
stories: There are about 100 billion galaxies each with 100 billion stars. That is 10 sextillion stars more than all grains of sand on every beach on Earth.
The Sun contains 99.86% of all mass in our solar system. All planets moons asteroids and comets combined make up only 0.14%. 1.3 million Earths could fit inside the Sun.
A black hole the size of a golf ball would contain the mass of Mount Everest. A tennis ball-sized one would have the mass of Earth.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: Saturn Would Float
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
stories: Saturn's density is 0.687 g/cm³ while water is 1 g/cm³. If you found a bathtub big enough Saturn would float. Jupiter is 5 times denser and would sink.
The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.
Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.

entries.title: NASA confirms this incredible fact: Jupiter's Great Red Spot
entries.hook: NASA confirms this incredible fact:
stories: A storm larger than Earth has raged on Jupiter for at least 400 years. It is 16000 km wide with winds reaching 640 km/h. Scientists don't know why it hasn't dissipated.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.
Without the Moon days would become 12 hours long. Earth's tilt could shift to 45° causing extreme seasons and mass extinction. Tides would shrink by 75%.

entries.hook: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering:
space_facts: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
The Sun Is a Million Earths
stories: The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.
The Sun contains 99.86% of all mass in our solar system. All planets moons asteroids and comets combined make up only 0.14%. 1.3 million Earths could fit inside the Sun.
The Sun is so massive that 1.3 million Earths could fit inside it. It converts 600 million tons of hydrogen into helium every second.

entries.title: The universe is bigger than you can imagine: Venus Day Longer Than Year
entries.hook: The universe is bigger than you can imagine:
space_facts: The Solar System Has a Tail
stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.
The solar system moves through space at 828000 km/h with a comet-like tail called the heliotail made of charged particles. It extends trillions of kilometers.

entries.title: NASA confirms this incredible fact: Olympus Mons Is Massive
entries.hook: NASA confirms this incredible fact:
stories: Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.
Saturn's north pole has a hexagonal cloud pattern 32000 km across each side longer than Earth's diameter. First seen by Voyager in 1981 no other planet has anything like it.
A black hole the size of a golf ball would contain the mass of Mount Everest. A tennis ball-sized one would have the mass of Earth.

stories: There are about 100 billion galaxies each with 100 billion stars. That is 10 sextillion stars more than all grains of sand on every beach on Earth.
Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.

entries.title: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering: The Moon Is Drifting Away
entries.hook: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering:
stories: The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.
When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.
Without the Moon days would become 12 hours long. Earth's tilt could shift to 45° causing extreme seasons and mass extinction. Tides would shrink by 75%.

entries.title: The universe is bigger than you can imagine: Venus Day Longer Than Year

stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: More Stars Than Sand
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
space_facts: The Solar System Has a Tail
stories: There are about 100 billion galaxies each with 100 billion stars. That is 10 sextillion stars more than all grains of sand on every beach on Earth.
The white dwarf star BPM 37093 nicknamed Lucy is a giant crystallized carbon sphere 4000 km across. It weighs 10 billion trillion trillion carats the largest diamond ever found.
The solar system moves through space at 828000 km/h with a comet-like tail called the heliotail made of charged particles. It extends trillions of kilometers.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: Jupiter's Great Red Spot
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
stories: A storm larger than Earth has raged on Jupiter for at least 400 years. It is 16000 km wide with winds reaching 640 km/h. Scientists don't know why it hasn't dissipated.
When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.

entries.hook: NASA confirms this incredible fact:
stories: Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.

entries.title: The universe is bigger than you can imagine: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
entries.hook: The universe is bigger than you can imagine:
space_facts: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
stories: The Sun contains 99.86% of all mass in our solar system. All planets moons asteroids and comets combined make up only 0.14%. 1.3 million Earths could fit inside the Sun.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.
A black hole the size of a golf ball would contain the mass of Mount Everest. A tennis ball-sized one would have the mass of Earth.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: Neutron Stars Are Insanely Dense
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
space_facts: The Sun Is a Million Earths
stories: A neutron star is 20 km across but contains more mass than the Sun. One teaspoon weighs 10 million tons the same as every human on Earth combined.
Saturn's density is 0.687 g/cm³ while water is 1 g/cm³. If you found a bathtub big enough Saturn would float. Jupiter is 5 times denser and would sink.
The Sun is so massive that 1.3 million Earths could fit inside it. It converts 600 million tons of hydrogen into helium every second.

entries.title: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering: Jupiter's Great Red Spot
entries.hook: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering:
stories: A storm larger than Earth has raged on Jupiter for at least 400 years. It is 16000 km wide with winds reaching 640 km/h. Scientists don't know why it hasn't dissipated.
When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.

entries.title: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
entries.hook: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering:
space_facts: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
The Sun Is a Million Earths
stories: The Sun contains 99.86% of all mass in our solar system. All planets moons asteroids and comets combined make up only 0.14%. 1.3 million Earths could fit inside the Sun.
Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.
The Sun is so massive that 1.3 million Earths could fit inside it. It converts 600 million tons of hydrogen into helium every second.

entries.title: The universe is bigger than you can imagine: Neutron Stars Are Insanely Dense
entries.hook: The universe is bigger than you can imagine:
stories: A neutron star is 20 km across but contains more mass than the Sun. One teaspoon weighs 10 million tons the same as every human on Earth combined.
In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.

entries.title: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering: Jupiter's Great Red Spot
entries.hook: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering:
space_facts: The Sun Is a Million Earths
stories: A storm larger than Earth has raged on Jupiter for at least 400 years. It is 16000 km wide with winds reaching 640 km/h. Scientists don't know why it hasn't dissipated.
Without the Moon days would become 12 hours long. Earth's tilt could shift to 45° causing extreme seasons and mass extinction. Tides would shrink by 75%.
The Sun is so massive that 1.3 million Earths could fit inside it. It converts 600 million tons of hydrogen into helium every second.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: Venus Day Longer Than Year
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
Saturn's density is 0.687 g/cm³ while water is 1 g/cm³. If you found a bathtub big enough Saturn would float. Jupiter is 5 times denser and would sink.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.

entries.title: NASA confirms this incredible fact: Coldest Place Is on Earth
entries.hook: NASA confirms this incredible fact:
stories: In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.
A black hole the size of a golf ball would contain the mass of Mount Everest. A tennis ball-sized one would have the mass of Earth.

entries.title: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
entries.hook: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering:
space_facts: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
stories: The Sun contains 99.86% of all mass in our solar system. All planets moons asteroids and comets combined make up only 0.14%. 1.3 million Earths could fit inside the Sun.
Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.

entries.title: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering: Earth Day Was Once 6 Hours
entries.hook: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering:
space_facts: The Solar System Has a Tail
The Sun Is a Million Earths
stories: When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.
The solar system moves through space at 828000 km/h with a comet-like tail called the heliotail made of charged particles. It extends trillions of kilometers.
The Sun is so massive that 1.3 million Earths could fit inside it. It converts 600 million tons of hydrogen into helium every second.

entries.title: NASA confirms this incredible fact: Jupiter's Great Red Spot
entries.hook: NASA confirms this incredible fact:
stories: A storm larger than Earth has raged on Jupiter for at least 400 years. It is 16000 km wide with winds reaching 640 km/h. Scientists don't know why it hasn't dissipated.
In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.
Without the Moon days would become 12 hours long. Earth's tilt could shift to 45° causing extreme seasons and mass extinction. Tides would shrink by 75%.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: More Stars Than Sand
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
space_facts: The Sun Is a Million Earths
stories: There are about 100 billion galaxies each with 100 billion stars. That is 10 sextillion stars more than all grains of sand on every beach on Earth.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.
The Sun is so massive that 1.3 million Earths could fit inside it. It converts 600 million tons of hydrogen into helium every second.

entries.title: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering: Venus Day Longer Than Year
entries.hook: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering:
stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.

The Moon Is Drifting Away. The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours. The Solar System Has a Tail. The solar system moves through space at 828000 km/h with a comet-like tail called the heliotail made of charged particles. It extends trillions of kilometers.

entries.title: The universe is bigger than you can imagine: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
entries.hook: The universe is bigger than you can imagine:
space_facts: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
stories: The Sun contains 99.86% of all mass in our solar system. All planets moons asteroids and comets combined make up only 0.14%. 1.3 million Earths could fit inside the Sun.
Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: Neutron Stars Are Insanely Dense
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
stories: A neutron star is 20 km across but contains more mass than the Sun. One teaspoon weighs 10 million tons the same as every human on Earth combined.
Saturn's density is 0.687 g/cm³ while water is 1 g/cm³. If you found a bathtub big enough Saturn would float. Jupiter is 5 times denser and would sink.
The white dwarf star BPM 37093 nicknamed Lucy is a giant crystallized carbon sphere 4000 km across. It weighs 10 billion trillion trillion carats the largest diamond ever found.

entries.title: NASA confirms this incredible fact: Pluto's Ice Mountains
entries.hook: NASA confirms this incredible fact:
stories: Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.
A black hole the size of a golf ball would contain the mass of Mount Everest. A tennis ball-sized one would have the mass of Earth.

entries.title: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering: Coldest Place Is on Earth
entries.hook: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering:
stories: In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.
Saturn's north pole has a hexagonal cloud pattern 32000 km across each side longer than Earth's diameter. First seen by Voyager in 1981 no other planet has anything like it.

entries.title: The universe is bigger than you can imagine: Venus Day Longer Than Year
entries.hook: The universe is bigger than you can imagine:
stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
A black hole the size of a golf ball would contain the mass of Mount Everest. A tennis ball-sized one would have the mass of Earth.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: Earth Day Was Once 6 Hours
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
stories: When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.
Without the Moon days would become 12 hours long. Earth's tilt could shift to 45° causing extreme seasons and mass extinction. Tides would shrink by 75%.

entries.title: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering: More Stars Than Sand
entries.hook: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering:
stories: There are about 100 billion galaxies each with 100 billion stars. That is 10 sextillion stars more than all grains of sand on every beach on Earth.
In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.

entries.title: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering: Saturn Would Float
entries.hook: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering:
stories: Saturn's density is 0.687 g/cm³ while water is 1 g/cm³. If you found a bathtub big enough Saturn would float. Jupiter is 5 times denser and would sink.
The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.
The white dwarf star BPM 37093 nicknamed Lucy is a giant crystallized carbon sphere 4000 km across. It weighs 10 billion trillion trillion carats the largest diamond ever found.

entries.title: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering: Jupiter's Great Red Spot
entries.hook: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering:
stories: A storm larger than Earth has raged on Jupiter for at least 400 years. It is 16000 km wide with winds reaching 640 km/h. Scientists don't know why it hasn't dissipated.
Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: Venus Day Longer Than Year
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
space_facts: The Solar System Has a Tail
stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
There are about 100 billion galaxies each with 100 billion stars. That is 10 sextillion stars more than all grains of sand on every beach on Earth.
The solar system moves through space at 828000 km/h with a comet-like tail called the heliotail made of charged particles. It extends trillions of kilometers.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: Uranus Rolls Sideways
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
stories: Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.
Saturn's north pole has a hexagonal cloud pattern 32000 km across each side longer than Earth's diameter. First seen by Voyager in 1981 no other planet has anything like it.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: The Moon Is Drifting Away
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
space_facts: The Solar System Has a Tail
stories: The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.

The solar system moves through space at 828000 km/h with a comet-like tail called the heliotail made of charged particles. It extends trillions of kilometers.

entries.title: The universe is bigger than you can imagine: Saturn Would Float
entries.hook: The universe is bigger than you can imagine:
stories: Saturn's density is 0.687 g/cm³ while water is 1 g/cm³. If you found a bathtub big enough Saturn would float. Jupiter is 5 times denser and would sink.
Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.

entries.title: NASA confirms this incredible fact: Venus Day Longer Than Year
entries.hook: NASA confirms this incredible fact:
stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
A storm larger than Earth has raged on Jupiter for at least 400 years. It is 16000 km wide with winds reaching 640 km/h. Scientists don't know why it hasn't dissipated.
Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.

entries.title: NASA confirms this incredible fact: Saturn Would Float

space_facts: The Sun Is a Million Earths
stories: Saturn's density is 0.687 g/cm³ while water is 1 g/cm³. If you found a bathtub big enough Saturn would float. Jupiter is 5 times denser and would sink.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.
The Sun is so massive that 1.3 million Earths could fit inside it. It converts 600 million tons of hydrogen into helium every second.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: The Moon Is Drifting Away
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
space_facts: The Sun Is a Million Earths
stories: The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.
The Sun is so massive that 1.3 million Earths could fit inside it. It converts 600 million tons of hydrogen into helium every second.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: Earth Day Was Once 6 Hours
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
space_facts: The Sun Is a Million Earths
stories: When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.
The Andromeda Galaxy approaches the Milky Way at 400000 km/h. In 4.5 billion years the two galaxies will collide but no star collisions are expected due to vast distances.
The Sun is so massive that 1.3 million Earths could fit inside it. It converts 600 million tons of hydrogen into helium every second.

space_facts: The Sun Is a Million Earths
stories: Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.
The Sun is so massive that 1.3 million Earths could fit inside it. It converts 600 million tons of hydrogen into helium every second.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: Venus Day Longer Than Year
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
The Andromeda Galaxy approaches the Milky Way at 400000 km/h. In 4.5 billion years the two galaxies will collide but no star collisions are expected due to vast distances.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: More Stars Than Sand
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
stories: There are about 100 billion galaxies each with 100 billion stars. That is 10 sextillion stars more than all grains of sand on every beach on Earth.
Saturn's density is 0.687 g/cm³ while water is 1 g/cm³. If you found a bathtub big enough Saturn would float. Jupiter is 5 times denser and would sink.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: Neutron Stars Are Insanely Dense
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
space_facts: The Solar System Has a Tail
stories: A neutron star is 20 km across but contains more mass than the Sun. One teaspoon weighs 10 million tons the same as every human on Earth combined.
The white dwarf star BPM 37093 nicknamed Lucy is a giant crystallized carbon sphere 4000 km across. It weighs 10 billion trillion trillion carats the largest diamond ever found.
The solar system moves through space at 828000 km/h with a comet-like tail called the heliotail made of charged particles. It extends trillions of kilometers.

entries.title: NASA confirms this incredible fact: Mercury Day Is 59 Earth Days
entries.hook: NASA confirms this incredible fact:
stories: Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
A storm larger than Earth has raged on Jupiter for at least 400 years. It is 16000 km wide with winds reaching 640 km/h. Scientists don't know why it hasn't dissipated.
A black hole the size of a golf ball would contain the mass of Mount Everest. A tennis ball-sized one would have the mass of Earth.

entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
stories: In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: The Moon Is Drifting Away
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
space_facts: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
stories: The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.
The Sun contains 99.86% of all mass in our solar system. All planets moons asteroids and comets combined make up only 0.14%. 1.3 million Earths could fit inside the Sun.
The Andromeda Galaxy approaches the Milky Way at 400000 km/h. In 4.5 billion years the two galaxies will collide but no star collisions are expected due to vast distances.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: Earth Day Was Once 6 Hours

space_facts: The Solar System Has a Tail
stories: When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.
The solar system moves through space at 828000 km/h with a comet-like tail called the heliotail made of charged particles. It extends trillions of kilometers.

entries.title: The universe is bigger than you can imagine: The Moon Is Drifting Away
entries.hook: The universe is bigger than you can imagine:
space_facts: The Solar System Has a Tail
stories: The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.
The solar system moves through space at 828000 km/h with a comet-like tail called the heliotail made of charged particles. It extends trillions of kilometers.

entries.title: The universe is bigger than you can imagine: Saturn Would Float
entries.hook: The universe is bigger than you can imagine:
space_facts: The Solar System Has a Tail
stories: Saturn's density is 0.687 g/cm³ while water is 1 g/cm³. If you found a bathtub big enough Saturn would float. Jupiter is 5 times denser and would sink.
The white dwarf star BPM 37093 nicknamed Lucy is a giant crystallized carbon sphere 4000 km across. It weighs 10 billion trillion trillion carats the largest diamond ever found.
The solar system moves through space at 828000 km/h with a comet-like tail called the heliotail made of charged particles. It extends trillions of kilometers.

entries.title: NASA confirms this incredible fact: Coldest Place Is on Earth
entries.hook: NASA confirms this incredible fact:
stories: In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.
Without the Moon days would become 12 hours long. Earth's tilt could shift to 45° causing extreme seasons and mass extinction. Tides would shrink by 75%.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: More Stars Than Sand
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
stories: There are about 100 billion galaxies each with 100 billion stars. That is 10 sextillion stars more than all grains of sand on every beach on Earth.
Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
The Andromeda Galaxy approaches the Milky Way at 400000 km/h. In 4.5 billion years the two galaxies will collide but no star collisions are expected due to vast distances.

entries.title: NASA confirms this incredible fact: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
entries.hook: NASA confirms this incredible fact:
space_facts: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
stories: The Sun contains 99.86% of all mass in our solar system. All planets moons asteroids and comets combined make up only 0.14%. 1.3 million Earths could fit inside the Sun.
When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.

space_facts: The Sun Is a Million Earths
stories: Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.

The Sun is so massive that 1.3 million Earths could fit inside it. It converts 600 million tons of hydrogen into helium every second.

stories: The Sun contains 99.86% of all mass in our solar system. All planets moons asteroids and comets combined make up only 0.14%. 1.3 million Earths could fit inside the Sun.
A storm larger than Earth has raged on Jupiter for at least 400 years. It is 16000 km wide with winds reaching 640 km/h. Scientists don't know why it hasn't dissipated.
A black hole the size of a golf ball would contain the mass of Mount Everest. A tennis ball-sized one would have the mass of Earth.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: The Moon Is Drifting Away
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
stories: The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.
Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: Venus Day Longer Than Year
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.
The Andromeda Galaxy approaches the Milky Way at 400000 km/h. In 4.5 billion years the two galaxies will collide but no star collisions are expected due to vast distances.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: Giant Diamond in Space
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
stories: The white dwarf star BPM 37093 nicknamed Lucy is a giant crystallized carbon sphere 4000 km across. It weighs 10 billion trillion trillion carats the largest diamond ever found.
Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.
When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.

stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.

Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.

entries.title: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering: Jupiter's Great Red Spot
entries.hook: The cosmos has secrets we're just discovering:
stories: A storm larger than Earth has raged on Jupiter for at least 400 years. It is 16000 km wide with winds reaching 640 km/h. Scientists don't know why it hasn't dissipated.
Pluto has water ice mountains 6500 meters high taller than the Rockies. The ice is harder than rock at -230°C. The mountains are made of frozen water not rock.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.

entries.title: The universe is bigger than you can imagine: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
entries.hook: The universe is bigger than you can imagine:
space_facts: The Sun Is 99.86% of All Mass
stories: The Sun contains 99.86% of all mass in our solar system. All planets moons asteroids and comets combined make up only 0.14%. 1.3 million Earths could fit inside the Sun.
Mercury rotates once every 59 Earth days but orbits the Sun in 88 days. From sunrise to sunrise a full day-night cycle on Mercury takes 176 Earth days.
Mars has Olympus Mons the largest volcano in the solar system at 21.9 km tall 2.5 times Everest. Its base is the size of Arizona. From the peak you wouldn't see the edge.

entries.title: This space fact will blow your mind: The Moon Is Drifting Away
entries.hook: This space fact will blow your mind:
stories: The Moon moves 3.8 cm away from Earth every year. When it formed 4.5 billion years ago it was 20 times closer. In 50 billion years a day on Earth will last 1000 hours.
The Andromeda Galaxy approaches the Milky Way at 400000 km/h. In 4.5 billion years the two galaxies will collide but no star collisions are expected due to vast distances.
Saturn's north pole has a hexagonal cloud pattern 32000 km across each side longer than Earth's diameter. First seen by Voyager in 1981 no other planet has anything like it.

entries.title: The universe is bigger than you can imagine: Coldest Place Is on Earth
entries.hook: The universe is bigger than you can imagine:
stories: In 2003 MIT scientists created a Bose-Einstein condensate at 0.5 nanokelvin half a billionth above absolute zero. That is colder than the Boomerang Nebula at 1 Kelvin.
Saturn's north pole has a hexagonal cloud pattern 32000 km across each side longer than Earth's diameter. First seen by Voyager in 1981 no other planet has anything like it.
A black hole the size of a golf ball would contain the mass of Mount Everest. A tennis ball-sized one would have the mass of Earth.

entries.title: Space is weirder than science fiction: Venus Day Longer Than Year
entries.hook: Space is weirder than science fiction:
stories: Venus takes 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun but 243 days to rotate. A day is longer than a year. Venus also rotates backward so the Sun rises in the west.
When the Moon formed 4.5 billion years ago Earth rotated much faster. A day was only 6 hours long. The Moon's gravity has been slowing Earth's rotation for billions of years.
Uranus is tilted 98 degrees essentially rolling around the Sun on its side. A massive collision with an Earth-sized object likely knocked it over 4 billion years ago.
